data.name: Title
data.value: Cookie and Privacy Policy

data.name: Section1Title
data.value: 1. Introduction

data.name: Section1Text
data.value: Welcome to our website. This policy explains how and why we use cookies and what data we collect through them.

data.name: Section2Title
data.value: 2. What are Cookies?

data.name: Section2Text
data.value: Cookies are small text files stored on your device when you visit a website. They are commonly used to make websites more functional and to provide information to the site owners.

data.name: Section3Title
data.value: 3. How and why do we use Cookies?

data.name: Section3Text
data.value: We use cookies to:

data.name: Section3Item1
data.value: Save your login status.

data.name: Section3Item2
data.value: Improve the performance and usability of our site.

data.name: Section4Title
data.value: 4. What data do we collect?

data.name: Section4Text
data.value: When you visit our website or register, the following data may be collected:

data.name: Section4Item1
data.value: IP address

data.name: Section4Item2
data.value: Browser type and version

data.name: Section4Item3
data.value: Email address (when you register or log in)

data.name: Section4Item4
data.value: Username (when you register or log in)

data.name: Section4Item5
data.value: Password (when you register or log in)

data.name: Section4Item6
data.value: Data collected during runtime (e.g., activities, settings)

data.name: Section5Title
data.value: 5. Data Deletion

data.name: Section5Text
data.value: When you delete your account, all data associated with your account, including email address, username, and runtime data, will be permanently deleted.

data.name: Section6Title
data.value: 6. How can you control Cookie usage?

data.name: Section6Text
data.value: Most browsers allow you to control cookies. You can configure settings to block or delete cookies. However, please note that some features of our website may not function correctly if cookies are disabled.

data.name: Section7Title
data.value: 7. Changes to this Policy

data.name: Section7Text
data.value: We may update this policy from time to time. Changes will be published on this page.

data.name: Section8Title
data.value: 8. Contact

data.name: Section8Text
data.value: If you have questions about this cookie and privacy policy, please contact
